title: ToolServerRecord
description: server.json-style publication record for one governed MCP tool server (tool-integration.md): tools with scopes and risk classes, owning team, wrapped system of record, data classification, rate limits, and deprecation. INTERNAL catalog only — it names scope vocabulary and SoR topology, so it is served on authenticated registry routes and never on the public A2A edge. Secrets are NEVER stored: auth.credential_ref is an env/vault KEY NAME expanded at the tool gateway.

version.description: Semver of the published tool contract.

owning_team.description: Accountable human team (no ownerless tool servers).

wrapped_sor.description: The system of record this server wraps (e.g. the ITSM, the cloud estate).

mode.description: credential-ref: the gateway brokers a static credential resolved from credential_ref at startup. token-exchange: RFC 8693 exchange toward audience/scope.

credential_ref.description: Env/vault KEY NAME (e.g. ACP_TOOL_CRED_CLOUD_ESTATE) — never the secret value.

header.description: Header the brokered credential is sent in; defaults to x-acp-broker-credential.

tools.description: The allowlist AND scope map: a tool absent here cannot be called through the gateway.

tool_rate_limits.description: Per-tool overrides; tools not named fall back to rate_limit.

scope.description: Delegated scope a caller must hold for Cedar to permit the call.

risk.description: Side-effect risk: R0 read, R1 draft, R2 write-gated, R3 write-auto.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for the tool input (informational; the gateway validates live).

output_schema.description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for the tool output (informational; the gateway validates live).
